title: Twist To A Fairytale Story :Mahakumbh-Fame Girl, Monalisa, Found To Be Minor, Her Hubby Booked
description: A POCSO (Protection of Children from Sexual Offences) case was filed in the Maheshwar police station in Khargone district, after an investigation by the National Commission for Scheduled Tribe (NCST) led to disclosure that she was around 16 when she married her boyfriend, Farman, in a Kerala temple on March 11 this year.
